name: dnm
description: Delete Node Modules - Recursively delete all node_modules directories under a specified path (Rust-powered)

scripts.copy-binary: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const platform=process.platform; const bin=path.join('bin', platform==='win32'?'dnm.exe':'dnm'); const target=path.join('target','release', platform==='win32'?'dnm.exe':'dnm'); if(fs.existsSync(target)){fs.mkdirSync('bin',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(target,bin);fs.chmodSync(bin,'0755');}"
